description: You are a software engineer at a bio-engineering lab. The custom 3D slicer 'py_slicer' used for a high-precision tissue printer is failing. It crashes on models with flat horizontal surfaces, misses the top layers of prints, and generates open-loop paths that cause material leakage. The project is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/py_slicer. Fix the bugs in 'py_slicer/engine.py' to ensure the slicer correctly handles horizontal edges, includes all top layers, and closes all polygon loops. All tests in 'tests/test_slicing.py' must pass. Do not modify the test files or the STL data readers; focus on the computational geometry logic in engine.py.
